core_principles: Density is Clarity: Maximize data-ink ratio.
Speed is a Feature: Immediate visual feedback, no laggy animations.
Trust through Precision: 1px borders, monospaced numbers, alignment perfection.
Darkness is the Canvas: Deep blacks, neon signal lights.

grid_system.signal_stream: col-span-12 md:col-span-3 lg:col-span-2 overflow-y-auto border-r border-border
grid_system.ai_panel: col-span-12 md:col-span-3 lg:col-span-3 border-l border-border bg-card/50

buttons.default: rounded-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-wide text-xs h-9 px-4 transition-all duration-200 active:scale-95

inputs.default: h-9 rounded-sm bg-input/50 border-transparent focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 font-mono text-sm

badges.signal: font-mono text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-sm uppercase tracking-wider border

cards.dashboard_widget: border border-border bg-card/40 hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure neon text on dark backgrounds meets 4.5:1 ratio. Use lighter shades (Zinc-300) for body text, not dark grey.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Disable pulse animations and slide-ins if prefers-reduced-motion is true.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus ring with color #00E096 for all interactive elements.

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Install Fonts: Add the Google Fonts link to public/index.html or import in index.css.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Update Tailwind Config: Copy the color palette and font families into tailwind.config.js.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Global Styles: Update index.css with the base layer variables.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Layout Skeleton: Build the main dashboard grid first.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Component Customization: Override Shadcn defaults to match the 'Sharp & Dense' aesthetic (remove rounded-md, use rounded-sm).
